creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Hi Max,

I forgot to remove PORTSDIR/misc/gimp-help-en/pkg-plist, so the DIFF
file I sent 19 hours ago is wrong.  Please ignore it, then check the
attached files on this mail.  SHAR file is identical to the one in the
yesterday mail.  I am so sorry for bothering you with unclear reports.

RyoTa ShimaMoto

2014/1/18, RyoTa SimaMoto <liangtai.s16@gmail.com>:
>> Could you upload the latest patch and shar or simply mail them to me?
> Ok.  SHAR and DIFF are attached.  Thank you.
>
